stemHtml: When an aircraft flying IFR in IMC encounters radiocommunication failure as it is being vectored or has been directed by ATC to proceed offset using RNAV without a specified limit, it shall proceed in the most direct manner possible to rejoin the current flight plan route no later than the next significant point. To do this, what has to be taken into consideration?

options.a: Other aircraft from which separation was provided using vectors, as separation from other traffic becomes the pilot`s responsibility.
options.b: The maximum turn to return to the current flight plan route is 45 degrees.
options.c: The deviations that may be needed to maintain visual separation from all other aircraft.
